title: Failure to compile CIRCT with provided README instructions: `...internal compiler error: in replace_placeholders_r...`
body:
I'm trying to build CIRCT following the instructions on the README, but I'm hitting a compile error.  I was able to build LLVM in release mode (debug mode ran out of memory on my laptop), but the build for CIRCT fails with the below error (`...internal compiler error: in replace_placeholders_r...`).  I've tried various minor tweaks but none of them have been successful at bypassing the error.

I'm building using WSL2 with Ubuntu on Windows 10, if that is relevant.

```
$ cmake -G Ninja .. \
>     -DMLIR_DIR=$PWD/../llvm/build/lib/cmake/mlir \
>     -DLLVM_DIR=$PWD/../llvm/build/lib/cmake/llvm \
>     -DLLVM_ENABLE_ASSERTIONS=ON \
>     -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=DEBUG \
>     -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON
```
